tasks.label: Simulator: UART set_bg ff0000 (auto)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=Get-Content .\sim_ports.json | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $p.uart_port) { Write-Host 'uart_port not found in sim_ports.json'; exit 1 }; $client = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; $client.Connect('127.0.0.1',$p.uart_port); $w = New-Object System.IO.StreamWriter($client.GetStream()); $w.AutoFlush = $true; $w.WriteLine('set_bg ff0000'); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 100; $client.Close()"

tasks.label: Simulator: simctl set_bg red (auto)
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$p=Get-Content .\sim_ports.json | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $p.rpc_port) { Write-Host 'rpc_port not found in sim_ports.json'; exit 1 }; python .\simctl.py $($p.rpc_port) set_bg 255 0 0"

tasks.label: Simulator: Smoke Test (auto)
Simulator: Start + Smoke Test
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host 'Use the Run button on compound tasks list.'"
